backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Unorganised Worker Survey backend; defines data types (Survey, OTP, SMS, RateLimit), includes blob storage and authorization mixins, and exposes query/update methods for user profiles and survey management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two features: restoring Jharkhand local language options in the survey's multi-select and adding Bangla as a supported UI language, with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated documentation file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, recent fixes, and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Unorganised Worker Survey' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/admin/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page displaying survey statistics (total submissions, verified/unverified counts, completion rate) via stat cards, with links to OTP logs, SMS outbox, and a CSV export button.
frontend/src/admin/AdminRouteGuard.tsx: Route guard component that restricts access to admin pages by checking Internet Identity authentication and admin status, showing a loading spinner or access-denied screen as appropriate.
frontend/src/admin/ExportCsvButton.tsx: Button component that triggers a survey data export, formats the results into a CSV file with translated category labels, and initiates a browser download.
frontend/src/admin/OtpLogsView.tsx: Admin view that displays OTP verification logs in a table with phone number filtering, showing phone, timestamp, and success/failure status badges.
frontend/src/admin/SmsOutboxView.tsx: Admin view that displays outbound SMS payloads sorted by timestamp with phone number filtering, showing phone, message type, message content, and timestamp.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with routes for the survey wizard, success page, and admin views (dashboard, OTP logs, SMS outbox), wrapped in theme and language providers.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page card component shown when a user lacks admin access, with a shield alert icon and a button to navigate back to the survey.
frontend/src/components/Auth/LoginButton: Button component that handles Internet Identity login/logout, toggling auth state and clearing the query cache, and renders the ProfileSetupModal when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/Auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name if no profile exists, then saves it via a mutation.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSwitcher: Dropdown menu component that lets users switch the app language among English, Hindi, and Bangla.
frontend/src/components/Layout/Footer.ts: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a 'powered by Caffeine' link with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Layout/Header.ts: Sticky header with the app logo, title, language switcher, login button, and an admin dashboard link shown only to authenticated admin users.
frontend/src/features/survey/components/: A reusable multi-select dropdown component using a popover with a searchable command list, displaying selected items as removable badges.
Handles phone number input, OTP generation, and OTP verification with a resend cooldown timer, displaying status messages and a 6-digit OTP input field.
Displays a labeled progress bar showing the current step out of total steps with a percentage completion indicator.
frontend/src/features/survey/draft/useDr: Custom hook providing save, load, clear, and existence-check operations for persisting survey draft data (step and form data) to localStorage.
frontend/src/features/survey/options.ts: Exports static option arrays and maps used throughout the survey, including Indian states, education levels, languages, experience groups, work/payment modes, challenge types, and primary/sub-category lists.
frontend/src/features/survey/ResumeDraft: Alert dialog that prompts users to resume a saved survey draft or start over, displaying the draft's last-saved time and step progress.
frontend/src/features/survey/signature/S: A canvas-based signature pad component that supports mouse and touch drawing, loads existing signatures, and emits base64 PNG data via an onChange callback. Includes a clear button when a signature is present.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step1: Survey step 1 that displays a welcome screen with a consent checkbox and collapsible privacy/token-terms notices before allowing the user to proceed.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step2: Survey step 2 variant that shows an informational notice explaining that phone verification is deferred, along with a list of benefits.
Survey step 2 that handles phone number entry, OTP generation with a resend cooldown, and OTP verification, updating survey data with the verified phone number on success.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step3: Survey step 3 that collects basic personal details including full name, gender, age, education level, and spoken languages, with a conditional text input for 'other' education.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step4: Survey step 4 that collects worker categorization data including primary category, sub-category (with a custom input for 'Other'), years of experience, and work mode via selects and radio groups.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step5: Survey step 5 component collecting work and income details including working days/hours, income ranges, payment mode, insurance, challenges, and primary work location with conditional fields.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step6: Survey step 6 component for capturing residential address (state, city, pincode, area, panchayat, block) and optionally a separate service/work location if different from residence.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step7: Optional survey step 7 for collecting identity information including Aadhaar number (formatted), alternative ID type selection, and file uploads for ID images.
frontend/src/features/survey/steps/Step8: Survey step 8 collecting additional worker inputs such as smartphone type, recharge/data plan details, app usage ability, expected benefits, and future onboarding interest.
frontend/src/features/survey/SubmissionS: Success screen shown after survey submission, displaying the survey ID, phone number, and timestamp, with buttons to print an acknowledgement or start a new survey.
frontend/src/features/survey/SurveyRevie: Renders the final review and submit step of the survey, handling OTP verification, a simple math CAPTCHA, and submission of all collected survey data to the backend via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/features/survey/SurveyWizar: Orchestrates the multi-step survey flow across 8 steps plus a review screen, managing navigation, step validation, draft save/resume, and submission success state.
frontend/src/features/survey/types.ts: Defines the full SurveyData TypeScript interface covering all survey steps (consent, phone, personal details, work, address, identity, and additional inputs) along with the initialSurveyData default values object.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend actor interactions including OTP generation/verification, survey submission, analytics, and user profile retrieval.
frontend/src/i18n/LanguageContext.tsx: Provides a React context for language selection (English, Hindi, Bengali) with localStorage persistence and a dot-notation translation lookup function.
frontend/src/i18n/translations/bn.ts: Contains Bengali (bn) translation strings for all UI text across the gig worker survey application, including common labels, step content, and privacy notices.
frontend/src/i18n/translations/en.ts: Contains English (en) translation strings for all UI text across the gig worker survey application, serving as the base translation reference with bilingual (English/Hindi) privacy notice content.
frontend/src/i18n/translations/hi.ts: Contains Hindi (hi) translation strings for all UI text across the gig worker survey application, including common labels, step content, and privacy notices.
frontend/src/i18n/translations/index.ts: Aggregates and exports all language translation objects (en, hi, bn) along with derived TypeScript types for supported languages and translation key shapes.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines light/dark mode CSS custom properties (oklch color tokens) for the design system, plus a fade-in animation utility.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to read URL/hash query parameters, persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar without page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration that maps oklch CSS variables to semantic color tokens, extends border radius and shadows, adds accordion keyframes, and registers typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a form builder with multilingual support; tracks existing features and a pending fix request to restore Jharkhand local language options (Santali, Mundari, Ho, etc.) plus Hindi, English, and Bangla in the language multi-select.
